whats_new.title: Jakarta EE 9.1 full platform support
whats_new.description: WebLogic Server 15.1.1.0.0 is a fully compatible implementation of Jakarta EE 9.1.

whats_new.title: Java SE 17 and 21 certification
whats_new.description: WebLogic Server 15c provides Java SE 17 and Java SE 21 certification.

whats_new.title: OpenRewrite upgrade recipes
whats_new.description: WebLogic Server application upgrade tooling provides OpenRewrite recipes for Jakarta namespace, descriptor, Java, Maven, and Spring migration tasks.

whats_new.title: Certificate Management Service technical preview
whats_new.description: WebLogic Server 15c introduces a Certificate Management Service technical preview for obtaining and storing certificates in domain keystores.

whats_new.title: Separate XA recovery database credentials
whats_new.description: XA data sources can use separate database credentials for XA recovery processing and application processing.

behavior_changes.title: Jakarta namespace migration
behavior_changes.description: Applications must move from Java EE javax namespaces to Jakarta EE jakarta namespaces for the WebLogic Server 15.1.1.0.0 application environment.

behavior_changes.title: Applications must be modified and recompiled
behavior_changes.description: Oracle documents that applications from WebLogic Server 12.2.1.4.0, 14.1.1.0.0, and 14.1.2.0.0 must be modified and recompiled for WebLogic Server 15.1.1.0.0.

behavior_changes.title: Jakarta EE namespace changes from javax to jakarta
behavior_changes.description: The primary Jakarta EE 9.1 platform change is the package namespace move from javax.* to jakarta.* APIs.

behavior_changes.title: Technical preview certificate service is not production-ready
behavior_changes.description: Oracle marks the Certificate Management Service as a technical preview for testing only, not for production environments.

deprecated.title: Legacy Jakarta EE specifications removed
deprecated.description: Jakarta EE 9 removes legacy specifications such as JAXR, XML RPC, Deployment, Management, and Distributed Interoperability.

deprecated.title: javax namespace no longer matches the target platform
deprecated.description: Applications using Java EE javax.* APIs must be migrated to Jakarta EE jakarta.* APIs for WebLogic Server 15.1.1.0.0.

deprecated.title: Legacy XML RPC specification removed from Jakarta EE 9
deprecated.description: XML RPC 1.1 is among the legacy specifications removed from the Jakarta EE 9 platform supported by WebLogic Server 15c.

deprecated.title: Legacy JAXR specification removed from Jakarta EE 9
deprecated.description: Jakarta XML Registries, formerly Java API for XML Registries, is among the specifications removed from Jakarta EE 9.
